code: const DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL='admin@elitehotels.com';const AUTH_STORAGE_KEY='user';const AUTH_TTL_MS=8*60*60*1000;export function getAdminEmail(){return(process.env.REACT_APP_ADMIN_EMAIL||DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL).trim().toLowerCase();}export function isAdminUser(user){if(!user){return false;}if(user.is_admin===true){return true;}return String(user.email||'').trim().toLowerCase()===getAdminEmail();}export function setStoredUser(user){const authState={user,expiresAt:Date.now()+AUTH_TTL_MS};localStorage.setItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(authState));}export function clearStoredUser(){localStorage.removeItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);}export function getStoredUser(){try{const rawUser=localStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);if(!rawUser){return null;}const parsed=JSON.parse(rawUser);if(parsed&&parsed.user&&parsed.expiresAt){if(Date.now()>parsed.expiresAt){clearStoredUser();return null;}return parsed.user;}if(Date.now()>AUTH_TTL_MS){clearStoredUser();return null;}return parsed;}catch(error){clearStoredUser();return null;}}
